title: BetterHeadSteal
description: BetterHeadSteal is a fan-made Minecraft plugin inspired by the YouTuber PSD1.
body:
# 🌍 TRY THIS PLUGIN LIVE ON BOLT SMP

[![Bolt SMP](https://i.ibb.co/LMJLVWf/standard-3.gif)](https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6)

#  BetterHeadSteal

**BetterHeadSteal** is a fan-made Minecraft plugin inspired by the YouTuber PSD1, designed to enhance player interactions in the game. This plugin introduces a unique gameplay mechanic where players can steal each other's heads upon death, adding an exciting twist to PvP encounters.

## Key Features:
- **Head Theft Mechanic:** When a player is killed by another player, their head drops as a unique item, complete with personalized information about the kill.
- **Prison System:** If a player is killed by another player, they are sent to a configurable prison location, where their inventory is cleared to prevent them from retaining any items.
- **Customizable Configurations:** The prison coordinates and other settings can be easily modified in the `config.yml` file.
- **Instant Inventory Clearing:** As soon as players are sent to prison, their inventory is instantly cleared to maintain fairness.
- **Adventure Mode:** Players are switched to adventure mode while in prison, preventing them from escaping easily.
- **Unique Player Experience:** This plugin enhances gameplay by adding elements of strategy and fun, making every encounter unique!

The **BetterHeadSteal** plugin aims to create a more engaging and interactive environment for players, encouraging thrilling PvP battles and strategic planning. Whether you’re looking to add a new layer of excitement to your Minecraft server or create a fun challenge for your friends, **BetterHeadSteal** is the perfect addition to your gameplay experience. 

With its unique features and customizable options, players will find themselves immersed in a world where every death matters, and every head stolen tells a story. Join the adventure and see how **BetterHeadSteal** can transform your Minecraft experience!
